summary: Made one surgical exit-line adjustment to point the chapter more directly toward the ward-level search that opens Chapter 4. The opening was left intact because it already bridges cleanly from Chapter 2 and does not duplicate the visible next-chapter opening scaffold. No style-bible example lines appeared verbatim in the draft.
edits: Revised the final sentence to shift Silas's next move from generic 'parts of the city' to 'the wards,' strengthening the handoff into Chapter 4's Sump Ward search.
